project.name: LLM Gateway
project.description: LLM API security proxy gateway — intercepts, scans, and audits all OpenAI-compatible API requests

sprints.name: Audit Log Body Storage & Retention
sprints.goal: Store full request/response body in audit logs, display in Detail Drawer with JSON preview, and implement two-layer TTL cleanup (7-day body, 30-day metadata)

features.title: Add body columns to audit_logs via migration
features.description: Create migration 002-add-audit-body.sql adding request_body, response_body (TEXT), request_body_truncated, response_body_truncated (INTEGER DEFAULT 0) to audit_logs table. Update AuditLogEntry and AuditLogRow types in audit-store.ts to include these 4 fields.
acceptance_criteria: Migration file 002-add-audit-body.sql created and runs successfully
audit_logs table has 4 new columns
AuditLogEntry interface includes request_body, response_body, request_body_truncated, response_body_truncated
AuditLogRow interface includes the same 4 fields
Existing tests pass after type changes
features.technical_notes: Migration goes in apps/gateway/migrations/. Types in apps/gateway/src/db/audit-store.ts. Fields are optional/nullable since existing rows won't have body data.

features.title: Write request/response body in audit logger
features.description: Update audit/logger.ts to capture and store request body and response body as JSON strings, with 128KB truncation per field. Set *_truncated=1 when content exceeds the limit. Blocked requests should have response_body=null.
acceptance_criteria: request_body stores JSON.stringify(request.body) capped at 128KB
response_body stores response payload capped at 128KB
request_body_truncated set to 1 when request body exceeds 128KB
response_body_truncated set to 1 when response body exceeds 128KB
Blocked requests have response_body=null
Streaming responses capture accumulated body
128KB = 131072 bytes
Existing audit tests pass
features.technical_notes: The onSend hook already captures response body in (request as any)._auditResponseBody. Extend the onResponse hook to serialize and truncate both bodies. Use String.prototype.slice or Buffer.byteLength for truncation at UTF-8 byte level.

features.title: Add audit config schema and cleanup cron plugin
features.description: Add [audit] config section to config.toml schema with retention_days (default 30), body_retention_days (default 7), cleanup_cron (default '0 * * * *'). Create audit/cleanup.ts as a Fastify plugin using fastify-cron to run the two-layer TTL cleanup on schedule.
acceptance_criteria: config.toml schema supports [audit] section with 3 fields
All 3 fields have sensible defaults (30, 7, '0 * * * *')
cleanup.ts plugin registers cron job via fastify-cron
Cleanup step 1: SET body fields to NULL for rows older than body_retention_days
Cleanup step 2: DELETE rows older than retention_days
Cleanup runs once on server start, then on cron schedule
Plugin registered in index.ts
features.technical_notes: Install fastify-cron package. Cleanup SQL uses SQLite datetime('now', '-N days') for date math. Plugin wraps both cleanup statements in a single db.transaction(). Register after DB plugin.

features.title: Return body fields in audit detail API
features.description: Update the detail endpoint GET /admin/audit/logs/:requestId to include the 4 new body columns in the SQL SELECT. The list endpoint remains unchanged (no body columns in SELECT).
acceptance_criteria: GET /admin/audit/logs/:requestId returns request_body, response_body, request_body_truncated, response_body_truncated
GET /admin/audit/logs (list) does NOT return body columns
AuditStore.getAuditLogById SELECT includes the 4 new columns
Existing admin audit tests pass
features.technical_notes: Only stmtGetByRequestId in AuditStore needs updating. The list query already uses explicit column names so no change needed there.

features.title: Create JSON preview Modal component
features.description: Create a new json-modal.tsx component in pages/audit/ for full-screen JSON preview. Shows request or response body with syntax highlighting, monospace font, scrollable content, copy-to-clipboard button, and close button. Only opens when body is non-null.
acceptance_criteria: json-modal.tsx created in apps/admin/src/pages/audit/
Modal displays JSON with monospace font and syntax highlighting
Content is horizontally and vertically scrollable
Copy-to-clipboard button works
Close button and overlay click dismiss the modal
Modal only renders when body content is non-null
features.technical_notes: Follow existing Modal/Drawer patterns in the codebase. Use existing shadcn/ui dialog or custom overlay. For syntax highlighting, consider a lightweight approach (CSS classes for JSON keys/strings/numbers) rather than a full library like prism.

features.title: Add body sections to Detail Drawer
features.description: Update detail-drawer.tsx to show collapsible Request Body and Response Body sections after Injection Score, before Content Hash. Each section has a collapsed state showing endpoint, an expanded state with JSON preview (capped at 2000 chars), truncation warning, and a button to open the full JSON Modal. Handle null body states (expired vs blocked).
acceptance_criteria: Request Body section appears after Injection Score field
Response Body section appears after Request Body section
Collapsed state shows endpoint label and '查看完整内容' button
Expanded state shows JSON preview capped at 2000 chars
Truncated warning shown when *_truncated === 1: '内容已被截断（超过 128KB）'
Null body for blocked response: '请求被拦截，无响应内容'
Null body for expired: '内容已过期清理（超过 7 天保留期）'
'查看完整内容' button opens JSON Modal
AuditLogRow type updated with 4 optional body fields in use-audit-logs.ts
features.technical_notes: Update AuditLogRow in use-audit-logs.ts to add request_body?, response_body?, request_body_truncated?, response_body_truncated?. Import and use JsonModal from ./json-modal. Follow existing collapsible pattern from PIIDetectedDisplay.
